sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56276" key="kauxh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καυχ-ήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n56276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boastful</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:5:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.10</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> Astr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
